title: aegiphila elata var. macrophylla
intro: Aegiphila elata var. macrophylla, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is also known as 'Brazilian rosewood'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aegiphila elata var. macrophylla include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Aegiphila elata var. macrophylla include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
